name: Rose Gold Face Serum
description: Luxury 24k rose gold infused anti-aging serum for radiant skin.
details: Infused with real 24k gold particles, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin C. Reduces fine lines, brightens skin tone, and provides deep hydration. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Oud Noir Perfume
description: Deep smoky oud with hints of amber and musk. 100ml EDP.
details: A masterful blend of rare oud wood, warm amber, and sensual musk. Long-lasting 12+ hour projection. Comes in an elegant black crystal bottle with gold accents.

name: Marble Candle Set
description: Set of 3 premium soy wax candles in marble finish holders.
details: Hand-poured 100% natural soy wax candles with cotton wicks. Scents include lavender, sandalwood, and vanilla. Each candle burns for 40+ hours. Marble holders are reusable.

name: Velvet Lip Collection
description: Set of 5 matte velvet lipsticks in exclusive luxury shades.
details: Ultra-pigmented formula with a smooth matte finish. Enriched with vitamin E and shea butter for comfortable all-day wear. Shades include nude, rose, berry, red, and plum.

name: Black Onyx Grooming Kit
description: Premium 7-piece grooming set in sleek black onyx finish.
details: Complete grooming kit includes razor, trimmer, nail file, tweezers, scissors, comb, and travel case. All tools crafted from surgical-grade stainless steel with black onyx coating.

name: Crystal Gift Hamper
description: Luxury curated gift hamper with premium skincare and fragrance.
details: Includes Rose Gold Face Serum, Velvet Lip Collection, Marble Candle, and Oud Noir Perfume mini. Beautifully packaged in a crystal clear box with gold ribbon. Perfect for gifting.

name: 24k Gold Eye Cream
description: Under-eye treatment infused with real gold particles.
details: Targets dark circles, puffiness, and fine lines. Contains real 24k gold, caffeine, and peptides. Apply morning and night for visible results in 2 weeks. 30ml airless pump bottle.

name: Silk Pillowcase Set
description: 100% pure mulberry silk pillowcase set in ivory and gold.
details: 22 momme weight pure mulberry silk. Reduces hair breakage and skin creasing. Naturally hypoallergenic and temperature regulating. Set includes 2 pillowcases in standard size.
